message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title PB-749 UC4 - Update a Banner on System Management actor "System Management" as SM participant "Core Next" as CN database "Next Database" as DB participant "Core Bradesco" as CB box "Next Platform" #LightGray participant CN database DB end box note over CN: Abstract:\nThis use case will be responsible to update an existing banner on Next.\nThis endpoint is not responsible for deleting a record. To do this, it\nmust use the use case 5 - Delete a Banner on System Management.\nHowever, in this use case, SM may enable or disable Banner. SM -> CN: 1 PUT /v1/notification/banner/{bannerID} note right of SM: System Management will call this new endpoint\npassing all the fields necessary to update an\nexisting Banner. The fields are:\n1. BANNER_ID\n2. BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE_ID\n3. TEMPLATE_HEADER\n4. TEMPLATE_BODY\n5. ENABLE_IND activate CN CN -> DB: 2 check if this Banner exists on BANNER table note right of CN: Core Next will check if this Banner exists on BANNER table activate DB DB --> CN: 3 response deactivate DB alt if the Banner exists CN -> DB: 4 check if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE received on requisition on BANNER table activate DB note right of CN: Note to developers\nCore Next will check if exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE on BANNER\ntable. We can only have one enabled Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE. For this\nrule, we should disregard the records that are with DELETE_FLG enabled and the Card itself. DB --> CN: 5 response deactivate DB alt if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE note right of CN: If exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE passed by App,\nwe will throw back an error to App side. CN --> SM: 6 error note right of SM: HTTP code: 422 #Pink else if don't exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE note right of CN: If the defensive checks pass, then we will update the register on BANNER table. CN -> DB: 7 update the register on BANNER table activate DB DB --> CN: 8 success deactivate DB CN --> SM: 9 success note right of SM: HTTP code: 200 #LightBlue end else if the Banner don't exists CN --> SM: 10 error note right of SM: If the Banner don't exists on\nBANNER table, then we will\nthrow back an error to SM.\nHTTP code: 404 #Pink end deactivate CN @enduml ```
